mnemonics: P.R.A.C.T.I.C.E. - Principles Require Action: Convert Theory Into Concrete Execution
keyPoints: The translation gap between high-level ethical principles and on-the-ground implementation is a central challenge.
Effective translation requires multi-stakeholder engagement, including policymakers, technologists, and civil society.
Operationalization involves creating specific tools like impact assessments, audits, and ethical design protocols.
commonMistakes: Assuming that publishing a set of principles is sufficient for ethical outcomes.
Treating ethics as a one-time checklist rather than an ongoing, iterative process integrated into development.
